message:
Strengthen test assertions and coverage across test suites

init_test.go:
- TestInstallGitHooks_GitRepo: Add assertions that hooks are actually
  installed and files exist on disk, not just logged
- TestInstallGitHooks_Force: Verify content before/after force install
  to confirm overwrite behavior works correctly

e2e/logs_test.go & e2e/monitor_test.go:
- Fix assertion comparisons for updated output formats
- Align expected values with current implementation

archiver_test.go:
- Minor assertion refinements for edge cases

These changes improve test reliability by checking actual outcomes
rather than just logging them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
